name: Ilvel Romayn
bio:
Physical Appearance: Dunmer (Dark Elf) male wearing monk robes. Carries an iron dagger and a few coins.
Race: Dunmer
Personality Keywords: devoted, penitent, trapped, silent
Role: Ilvel Romayn is a mage found at the Daedric Shrine of Peryite. He participated in a ritual meant to summon Peryite, but the ritual backfired and his soul became trapped in Oblivion while his body remained frozen in Nirn.
Home Location Information: The Daedric Shrine of Peryite.
The Trapped Soul: Ilvel's soul is trapped in Peryite's Realm in Oblivion due to the failed summoning ritual. He can be found due west from the arrival point in the Realm. Once his soul is freed and returned to his body in Nirn, he resumes his routines but refuses conversation, claiming he and his fellow cultists must redeem themselves to Peryite.
Daily Routine: After being freed, Ilvel spends all of his time wandering around the shrine, at times sitting on one of the benches and listening to the sermons randomly held by either Kewan or Maren the Seal.
Magical Abilities: Being a mage, Ilvel knows the standard leveled spells for his class.
Personality - The Penitent Cultist: Ilvel is devoted to Peryite and deeply affected by the ritual's failure. After his soul is freed and returned, he becomes focused on redemption, refusing to speak to others as he and his fellow cultists work to make amends to their Daedric Prince. His silence reflects both his penitence and his commitment to proving himself worthy once more.
author: Bethesda
